title: Tusuk Jelangkung di Lubang Buaya
overview: Taman Lubang Buaya, famous for its creepiness, has been chosen to be the next vlogging location. Out of the plan, Sisi disappeared after "calling" an evil spirit for being famous on social media. Can Sisi finally escape?
